settings.text:
Please review our store policies before placing an order. These rules help us provide a clear and reliable shopping experience.

Age requirement
Customers must meet the legal age requirement for purchasing age-restricted products. We may refuse orders that do not meet this requirement.

Orders and availability
Product availability, pricing, and promotions can change without prior notice. If an item becomes unavailable, we will contact you with the available options.

Delivery
Delivery times are estimates and may vary due to location, traffic, weather, or order volume. Please provide accurate contact and delivery details.
